_publications._publicationTitle: Chemical genetic screens reveal defective lysosomal trafficking as synthetic lethal with NF1 loss.

_contextSnippet: We found that, although p62 expression increased with Y102 or HCQ treatment, Y102 treatment alone did not result in LC3-II accumulation
details: Y102 treatment alone did not result in LC3-II accumulation, unlike HCQ treatment, suggesting Y102 is unlikely to be a macroautophagy inhibitor
